N(x,{m;E,g;r,U,k;H,J;y},z,Y)end return m end,function(x,z)local Y=B(z)local m=function(m,E,g,r,U,k,H,J,y,B,u)return N(x,{m;E,g,r;U;k,H,J,y;B;u},z,Y)end return m end,function(x)H[x]=H[x]-(951639+-951638)if-39178-(-39178)==H[x]then H[x],k[x]=nil,nil end end return(d(14618638-623999,{}))(Y(U))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[z(-963178-(-984312))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
